description.en: Sent to theMediaQueryListwhen the result of running the media query against the document changes. For example, if the media query is(width >= 400px), thechangeevent is fired any time the width of the document'sviewportchanges such that its width moves across the 400px boundary in either direction.

description.en: Represents the textual representation of the rule, e.g.,"h1,h2 { font-size: 16pt }"or"@import 'url'". To access or modify parts of the rule (e.g., the value of "font-size" in the example) use the properties on the specialized interface for the rule's type (see above).
